title: Optimizing WebAssembly Execution via Neural Block Compilers
venue: International Conference on Architectural Support for Programming Languages and Operating Systems (ASPLOS)
abstract: We present a novel approach to optimizing WebAssembly bytecode translation using machine learning architectures. By training neural models on control flow graph heuristics, we achieve a 14% improvement in execution speed across standard compute benchmarks.

title: State Machine Replication at Sub-Millisecond Latencies
venue: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems (TPDS)
abstract: Traditional consensus protocols introduce significant coordination overheads. This paper explores a hybrid consensus algorithm combining optimistic execution with classic Raft mechanisms to reduce tail latencies in local area database nodes.
